Headline: 15 Temporary Northbound Reroute near Jeffrey & 73rd
ShortDescription: Northbound 15 buses are temporarily rerouted via Jeffery, 73rd, Yates, 71st, Jeffery, over the regular route near Jeffrey.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound 15 Jeffrey buses are temporarily rerouted via Jeffery, 73rd, Yates, 71st, Jeffery, over the regular route due to Construction near Jeffrey & 73rd.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: 60 Route Temporary Reroute at 26th & Sawyer
ShortDescription: 60 buses are temporarily rerouted via 26th, Central Park, Cermak, Kedzie, 26th, over regular route due to construction near 26th & Sawyer.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 26th, Central Park, Cermak, Kedzie, 26th, over regular route due to construction near 26th & Sawyer.

Opposite Direction in reverse

Allow extra travel time.
